allow: PowerShell(Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; \(Get-Command docker\).Source; where.exe docker 2>$null)

PowerShell(Write-Host "Arxivdan chiqarilmoqda..."; Expand-Archive -Path "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\mariadb.zip" -DestinationPath "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\tmp" -Force; $folder = Get-ChildItem "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\tmp" -Directory | Select-Object -First 1; Move-Item $folder.FullName "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\mariadb"; Remove-Item "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\tmp" -Recurse -Force; Remove-Item "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\mariadb.zip"; Write-Host "Tayyor")

PowerShell($mysqld = "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\mariadb\\bin\\mysqld.exe"; $dataDir = "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\data"; Start-Process -FilePath $mysqld -ArgumentList "--datadir=`"$dataDir`"","--port=3308","--bind-address=127.0.0.1","--innodb-buffer-pool-size=64M","--console" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "MariaDB ishga tushirildi, kutilmoqda..."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $mysqladmin = "D:\\programma\\cybercontrol_server\\cybercontrol-new\\db\\mariadb\\bin\\mysqladmin.exe"; & $mysqladmin --host=127.0.0.1 --port=3308 -u root --password= ping 2>&1)
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-Command","wsl --install --no-distribution; Write-Host 'WSL2 o rnatildi'" -Verb RunAs -Wait 2>&1)
